title: Delhi court refuses to lift ban on media reports linking Manoj Sandesaras to Sterling Biotech bank fraud
description: A Delhi court today refused to lift a gag order passed in April banning any news content linking Manoj Kesari Chand Sandesara or his family members to the alleged Sterling Biotech bank fraud case. The court confirmed an April 4 ex parte interim injunction order that had directed Google, Meta and John Doe defendants (unknown persons) to de-index, de-list, and de-reference the URLs and content of articles flagged by Sandesara. The order was passed after Sandesara filed a defamation case.
